title: Movies Tab Merge — collapse all carousel genre sections into a single 'My Movies' section
commit_message: feat: merge all movie genre carousels into one 'My Movies' section on the Movies tab — add MY_MOVIES_TITLE, carousaTypes.Movies, and mergedMoviesSection memo
changed_symbols: mergedMoviesSection (new useMemo — flattens all non-sports carousel sections into one)

what_the_diff_does.before: The Movies tab shows multiple carousel rows, one per genre (Thriller, Crime, Drama, etc.), each returned as a separate section from the composer API.
what_the_diff_does.after: The Movies tab shows a single carousel row titled 'My Movies' containing all movie items from every genre merged together. Sports/highlight sections are unchanged and still appear below.
what_the_diff_does.visible_change: Instead of multiple labelled genre rows on the Movies tab, users see one big row called 'My Movies' that includes all movies from every genre in the order they were received from the API.
what_the_diff_does.compile_note: MY_MOVIES_TITLE is imported alongside the existing carousaTypes import. The mergedMoviesSection memo is added as an additional selector — no existing selectors are removed.

CRITICAL.reason: movies-merge.feature.test.js declares both changed files as @source and covers every new symbol: MY_MOVIES_TITLE (2 tests), carousaTypes.Movies (4 tests), mergedMoviesSection (16 tests). All 22 are CRITICAL.
tests: carousaTypes.Movies > is distinct from Sports type
carousaTypes.Movies > is distinct from Shows type
carousaTypes.Movies > original carousaTypes entries are still present
mergedMoviesSection > returns an empty array when homeScreenData is undefined
mergedMoviesSection > returns an empty array when homeScreenData is null
mergedMoviesSection > returns exactly one movie section plus sports sections
mergedMoviesSection > first section title is MY_MOVIES_TITLE
mergedMoviesSection > first section type is carousaTypes.Movies
mergedMoviesSection > merged section data combines items from all non-sports sections
mergedMoviesSection > Sports section is preserved after the merged movie section
mergedMoviesSection > isSportsHighlightContent section is preserved after the merged movie section
mergedMoviesSection > the old individual genre sections are NOT in the result
mergedMoviesSection > returns original data unchanged when all sections are sports
mergedMoviesSection > handles sections with no data property gracefully

HIGH.reason: home-search.feature.test.js and sports.feature.test.js both declare homescreen-related source files. The carousel merging must not break home search state or sports section rendering.

SKIP.reason: All remaining test files do not declare constants.js or HomeIntroPage.js as a source and do not test carousel merging logic.

coverage_gaps.gap: No existing tests covered this new constant.
No existing tests covered this new carousaTypes field.
No existing tests covered the merge logic.

jest_run_note: movies-merge.feature.test.js runs 17 CRITICAL tests. home-search and sports run 38 HIGH tests confirming no regressions in carousel state or sports section display.
